title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 8
instructions: For each question, choose the correct picture. You will hear each audio twice.

items.context: You hear girl and boy talking about the bus stop.
items.audio_script: Girl: Hi, Anna. I’m checking the plan for the bus stop. I thought we were going to wait by the station, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message. || Boy: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. [1]The bus leaves from the stop outside the supermarket today[/1]. || Girl: Good thing I asked. I nearly gone to the station again. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast. || Boy: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Hi, Anna. I’m checking the plan for the bus stop. I thought we were going to wait by the station, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. The bus leaves from the stop outside the supermarket today.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Good thing I asked. I nearly gone to the station again. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, bus stop outside supermarket, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, bus stop near hospital, no text, flat educational drawing, minimal details, clean white background.

items.explanation: The speaker says: “The bus leaves from the stop outside the supermarket today.” This matches option B.

items.context: You hear mum and dad talking about the birthday call.
items.audio_script: Mum: Hi, Tom. I’m checking the plan for the birthday call. I thought we were going to phone at eight, but I may have mixed it up after yesterday's message. || Dad: It changed this morning. Our teacher sent a new note to everyone before registration. [1]She asked us to call at quarter past eight after dinner[/1]. || Mum: Good thing I asked. I nearly called while she was eating. I haven’t looked at my phone since breakfast. || Dad: Don’t worry, there’s still enough time. I’ll wait for you by the entrance, so we can go together.
